get.summary: Listar cursos activos (paginado, filtros, fuzzy search)
get.description:
List active courses with advanced filtering and pagination.

Query Parameters:
- q: Fuzzy search on course name (case-insensitive LIKE)
- university_id: Filter by university
- faculty_id: Filter by faculty
- sort_by: Sort by 'name' or 'evaluation_count'
- sort_order: 'asc' or 'desc'
- page: Page number (1-indexed)
- page_size: Items per page (1-50)

post.summary: Crear evaluacion multi-criterio (con comentario y hashtags opcionales)

403.description: Usuario no verificado o profesor no validado

422.description: Validacion fallida (hashtags, banned terms, curso no dictado)

get.summary: Listar todas las evaluaciones (público, filtrable, paginado)
get.description:
List all evaluations with advanced filtering and pagination.

Public endpoint - no authentication required.
